concerns.text: FR-006 requires 'explicitly defining a utility function or cost matrix' for the sensitivity analysis. The plan.md and research.md describe the threshold sweep and reporting of FPR/FNR, but do not mention the definition or implementation of a utility function or cost matrix. This is a silent under-planning of a specific functional requirement.

SC-005 requires measuring data validity against a 'completeness rate of ≥ 95%'. The plan.md and research.md discuss data ingestion and synthetic fallback but do not include a task or metric to calculate and report this specific completeness rate. The success criterion will not be measured.
